payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Please choose how to handle this.
repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory unchanged: Sara is my daughter.
Keep both facts separately because Sara may be both your daughter and your niece in your family context.
Clarify the relationship before updating, e.g., specify whether Sara is your daughter, niece, or both.
